lineage.Process: CreateFishnet D:\研究生\论文\高新技术企业空间集聚\GIS_new_experiment\阶段一：企业动态变量研究\1、创建渔网\FishNet500m.gdb\grid_base_500m "393019.9993 2496168.0263" "393019.9993 2496178.0263" 500 500 # # "505559.5063 2648196.4263" LABELS "393019.9993 2496168.0263 505559.5063 2648196.4263 PROJCS["CGCS2000_3_Degree_GK_CM_114E",GEOGCS["GCS_China_Geodetic_Coordinate_System_2000",DATUM["D_China_2000",SPHEROID["CGCS2000",6378137.0,298.257222101]],PRIMEM["Greenwich",0.0],UNIT["Degree",0.0174532925199433]],PROJECTION["Gauss_Kruger"],PARAMETER["False_Easting",500000.0],PARAMETER["False_Northing",0.0],PARAMETER["Central_Meridian",114.0],PARAMETER["Scale_Factor",1.0],PARAMETER["Latitude_Of_Origin",0.0],UNIT["Meter",1.0]]" 面

UpdateSchema "CIMDATA=<CIMStandardDataConnection xsi:type='typens:CIMStandardDataConnection' xmlns:xsi='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance' xmlns:xs='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema' xmlns:typens='http://www.esri.com/schemas/ArcGIS/3.1.0'><WorkspaceConnectionString>DATABASE=D:\研究生\论文\高新技术企业空间集聚\GIS_new_experiment\阶段一：企业动态变量研究\1、创建渔网\FishNet500m.gdb</WorkspaceConnectionString><WorkspaceFactory>FileGDB</WorkspaceFactory><Dataset>grid_base_500m</Dataset><DatasetType>esriDTFeatureClass</DatasetType></CIMStandardDataConnection>" <operationSequence><workflow><AddField><field_name>grid_id</field_name><field_type>TEXT</field_type><field_length>20</field_length><field_is_nullable>True</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow><workflow><AddField><field_name>cent_x</field_name><field_type>DOUBLE</field_type><field_is_nullable>True</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow><workflow><AddField><field_name>crnt_y</field_name><field_type>DOUBLE</field_type><field_is_nullable>True</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow><workflow><AddField><field_name>row_id</field_name><field_type>LONG</field_type><field_is_nullable>True</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow><workflow><AddField><field_name>col_id</field_name><field_type>LONG</field_type><field_is_nullable>True</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow><workflow><AddField><field_name>dl_grid_id</field_name><field_type>TEXT</field_type><field_length>255</field_length><field_is_nullable>True</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow></operationSequence>
CalculateField grid_base_500m grid_id ""G" + str(!OID!).zfill(6)" "Python 3" # 文本 NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS

UpdateSchema "CIMDATA=<CIMStandardDataConnection xsi:type='typens:CIMStandardDataConnection' xmlns:xsi='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance' xmlns:xs='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema' xmlns:typens='http://www.esri.com/schemas/ArcGIS/3.1.0'><WorkspaceConnectionString>DATABASE=D:\研究生\论文\高新技术企业空间集聚\GIS_new_experiment\阶段一：企业动态变量研究\1、创建渔网\FishNet500m.gdb</WorkspaceConnectionString><WorkspaceFactory>FileGDB</WorkspaceFactory><Dataset>grid_base_500m</Dataset><DatasetType>esriDTFeatureClass</DatasetType></CIMStandardDataConnection>" <operationSequence><workflow><AlterField><field_name>crnt_y</field_name><new_field_name>cent_y</new_field_name><field_is_nullable>True</field_is_nullable><clear_field_alias>False</clear_field_alias></AlterField></workflow></operationSequence>

CalculateGeometryAttributes grid_base_500m "cent_x CENTROID_X;cent_y CENTROID_Y" # # PROJCS["CGCS2000_3_Degree_GK_CM_114E",GEOGCS["GCS_China_Geodetic_Coordinate_System_2000",DATUM["D_China_2000",SPHEROID["CGCS2000",6378137.0,298.257222101]],PRIMEM["Greenwich",0.0],UNIT["Degree",0.0174532925199433]],PROJECTION["Gauss_Kruger"],PARAMETER["False_Easting",500000.0],PARAMETER["False_Northing",0.0],PARAMETER["Central_Meridian",114.0],PARAMETER["Scale_Factor",1.0],PARAMETER["Latitude_Of_Origin",0.0],UNIT["Meter",1.0]] 与输入相同

ExportTable grid_base_500m D:\研究生\论文\高新技术企业空间集聚\GIS_new_experiment\阶段一：企业动态变量研究\1、创建渔网\grid_base_500m_for_dl.csv # NOT_USE_ALIAS "Shape_Length "Shape_Length" false true true 8 Double 0 0,First,#,grid_base_500m,Shape_Length,-1,-1;Shape_Area "Shape_Area" false true true 8 Double 0 0,First,#,grid_base_500m,Shape_Area,-1,-1;grid_id "grid_id" true true false 20 Text 0 0,First,#,grid_base_500m,grid_id,0,20;cent_x "cent_x" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,grid_base_500m,cent_x,-1,-1;cent_y "crnt_y" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,grid_base_500m,cent_y,-1,-1;row_id "row_id" true true false 4 Long 0 0,First,#,grid_base_500m,row_id,-1,-1;col_id "col_id" true true false 4 Long 0 0,First,#,grid_base_500m,col_id,-1,-1;dl_grid_id "dl_grid_id" true true false 255 Text 0 0,First,#,grid_base_500m,dl_grid_id,0,255" #

itemLocation.linkage: file://\\LRB\D$\研究生\论文\高新技术企业空间集聚\GIS_new_experiment\阶段一：企业动态变量研究\1、创建渔网\grid_base_500m_for_dl.csv

attr.attrdef: Length of feature in internal units.

attrdomv.udom: Positive real numbers that are automatically generated.

attr.attrdef: Area of feature in internal units squared.

attrdomv.udom: Positive real numbers that are automatically generated.
